sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Erica Gessert Sells 9,044 Shares of Upwork (NASDAQ:UPWK) Stock
feed.summary: Upwork's CFO, Erica Gessert, sold 9,044 shares of the company's stock on December 18th for approximately $186,216, reducing her stake by 3.54%. This sale follows a previous transaction in November. Upwork's Q3 earnings missed estimates for EPS but beat on revenue, and the company has authorized a $100 million share buyback program.

feed.title: Silvercorp Metals Inc Shares React to Executive Decisions Within TSX Smallcap Index
feed.summary: The article discusses the impact of executive decisions on Silvercorp Metals Inc. shares within the TSX Smallcap Index. It highlights that executives have partially reduced their holdings in the company, though a substantial share position remains, with no executive share additions reported during the reviewed period. The company continues to disclose executive activity in accordance with Canadian reporting standards.

feed.title: Strongsville’s five-year budget for waste hauling, recyclable processing to rise by 38 percent
feed.summary: The city of Strongsville's five-year contract with Republic Services for waste hauling and recyclable processing will see a 38 percent increase, rising from $14.1 million to $19.3 million. Despite the significant budget increase, the city does not plan to pass these costs onto residents and will continue manual waste collection rather than adopting an automated system due to high capital costs. Strongsville will also maintain its unique seven-day-a-week trash drop-off transfer station and ensure Republic Services addresses issues like debris spills and transfer station maintenance.

feed.title: Publicis Media Wins Kenvue's $1.3B Global Business 12/23/2025
feed.summary: Publicis Media has won Kenvue's global media business, which is estimated at $1.35 billion annually. Publicis will handle media, commerce, healthcare professional, and technology support, as well as creative and production for the Neutrogena brand. WPP will lead creative and production for all other Kenvue brands.

feed.title: SEPA Reappoints Duke Energy, Holy Cross Energy and SMUD Leaders to Board of Directors
feed.summary: The Smart Electric Power Alliance (SEPA) has reappointed Jeff Guldner (former Pinnacle West CEO, current Duke Energy board member), Bryan Hannegan (President & CEO of Holy Cross Energy), and Paul Lau (CEO & General Manager of Sacramento Municipal Utility District) to its Board of Directors. Their renewed service, effective January 1, 2026, will support SEPA's clean energy transition pillars of Grid, Growth, and Globe, leveraging their diverse expertise from the utility sector.

feed.title: Northern Trust (NASDAQ:NTRS) Reaches New 1-Year High - What's Next?
feed.summary: Northern Trust Corporation (NASDAQ:NTRS) recently hit a new 52-week high of $140.75, closing at $140.82. Analysts have mixed ratings, with an average "Hold" and target price of $132.46. The company reported strong Q3 earnings, beating consensus estimates, and recently announced a quarterly dividend of $0.80 per share.

feed.title: It’s All About the Meat: Can a New High-Protein Menu Get Chipotle Stock Back on Track?
feed.summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill is launching a new High Protein Menu featuring options like a Single Chicken Taco and a High Protein Cup to capitalize on the growing demand for protein-dense foods and cater to GLP-1 drug users. This strategic move aims to boost margins and diversify its customer base amid slowing transaction frequency and a 38% stock decline over the past year. While analysts anticipate a bump in Q1 2026 same-store sales, the article suggests a "hold" strategy for CMG stock given its current valuation and the long recovery timeline.

feed.title: M&T Bank Corp stock hits 52-week high at $208.19 By Investing.com
feed.summary: M&T Bank Corp stock has reached a new 52-week high of $208.19, reflecting an 8.87% positive one-year change and strong investor confidence. The company also reported strong Q3 2025 earnings, surpassing analyst expectations with EPS of $4.87, and announced a reduction in its prime lending rate and upcoming quarterly dividends for common and preferred stock. These developments highlight the bank's resilience and strategic financial management.

feed.title: Zacks.com featured highlights include NVIDIA, Micron Technology and Seagate Technology
feed.summary: This article highlights NVIDIA, Micron Technology, and Seagate Technology as top profitable S&P 500 stocks to consider before 2026, based on their high net income ratios. It explains the significance of the net income ratio as a profitability metric and provides the 12-month net profit margins for each of the featured companies. The piece encourages investors to use screening tools like Zacks' Research Wizard for similar stock identification.

feed.title: Zacks.com featured highlights include NVIDIA, Ralph Lauren, Expedia and Cencora
feed.summary: This article highlights four stocks—NVIDIA, Ralph Lauren, Expedia, and Cencora—trading near their 52-week highs, suggesting they have further upside potential. It explains that while investors often fear overvaluation at 52-week highs, strong fundamentals and momentum can drive continued growth. Each company's strong performance, future prospects, and analyst consensus estimates are detailed, making a case for why they are expected to keep scaling new highs.

feed.title: RTX’s Raytheon Gets Spain’s Largest-Ever Patriot Systems Deal Worth $1.7 Billion
feed.summary: Raytheon, a business unit of RTX Corporation, has secured a $1.7 billion contract with Spain to supply four Patriot air and missile defense systems, marking Spain's largest Patriot order to date. The deal includes radars, launchers, command-and-control stations, and training equipment, with Raytheon partnering with local Spanish defense companies. This comes as Patriot systems are in high demand globally, with other countries like Germany, the Netherlands, and Romania also increasing their orders.

feed.title: The FDA approves the first GLP-1 weight loss pill
feed.summary: The FDA has approved Novo Nordisk's oral version of Wegovy, making it the first GLP-1 pill for weight loss in the US. This new oral option, expected on the market within weeks, will provide a more convenient alternative to injectable GLP-1s and is poised to intensify competition with Eli Lilly in the growing obesity treatment market. The approval expands patient choice and is anticipated to capture a significant share of the GLP-1 market by 2030.

feed.title: FDA posts Class I recall notice about Medtronic heart vent catheters
feed.summary: The FDA has issued a Class I recall notice for Medtronic's DLP Left Heart Vent Catheters due to issues with shape retention and perforation injuries. Medtronic had previously initiated a customer notification and quarantine of the affected lots after receiving 41 complaints, including three serious perforation injuries. The company has since corrected the issue for newly manufactured lots, but acknowledged limited product availability.

feed.title: Is It Worth Investing in Intuit (INTU) Based on Wall Street's Bullish Views?
feed.summary: This article analyzes Intuit (INTU) stock based on Wall Street analyst recommendations and Zacks Rank. While analysts show a bullish sentiment with a high average brokerage recommendation, the article cautions against relying solely on these ratings due to potential bias. It suggests using the Zacks Rank, which is based on earnings estimate revisions, as a more reliable indicator for investment decisions.

feed.title: Wall Street Analysts Think Merck (MRK) Is a Good Investment: Is It?
feed.summary: This article analyzes Merck (MRK) stock based on Wall Street analyst recommendations and the Zacks Rank. While Merck currently has an average brokerage recommendation (ABR) suggesting a "Buy," the article cautions against relying solely on these recommendations due to potential biases. It recommends using the Zacks Rank, which is based on earnings estimate revisions, as a more reliable indicator for investment decisions.

feed.title: Alphabet (GOOG) Class C Stock on 23.12.2025: Today’s News, Analyst Forecasts, and 2026 Outlook for Google Shares
feed.summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Class C stock (NASDAQ: GOOG) is being closely watched by investors as 2025 ends, with a focus on its ability to convert aggressive AI investments into sustainable earnings growth amidst power constraints and regulatory pressures. The company recently announced a $4.75 billion acquisition of Intersect to bolster its AI infrastructure, while also navigating antitrust challenges in various jurisdictions and working to reduce dependence on Nvidia's AI chips. Analysts maintain a generally constructive outlook for GOOG stock in 2026, though significant capital expenditure on AI and potential impacts from regulatory remedies remain key debates for investors.

feed.title: Monroe County wants to see these three restaurants in 2026
feed.summary: Monroe County residents expressed their strong desire for new restaurant options in 2026 through a reader poll by The Monroe News. The top three most requested restaurants were Texas Roadhouse, Olive Garden, and MOD Pizza, highlighting a craving for Tex-Mex, Italian, and customizable pizza. Other popular choices included The Cheesecake Factory, In-N-Out Burger, and Longhorn Steakhouse.

feed.title: Boston Scientific head of cardiac rhythm management, diagnostics to retire, successor named
feed.summary: Scott Olson, SVP and president of Boston Scientific’s Cardiac Rhythm Management & Diagnostics (CRMDx) business, announced his retirement at the end of 2025. Angelo De Rosa, who previously led the Watchman business, will succeed Olson as president of CRMDx and join the Boston Scientific executive committee at the start of 2026. De Rosa will focus on advancing cardiac care with a mission to innovate and deliver for clinicians and patients.

feed.title: Moderna CEO Bancel holds expiring stock options, bets on drugmaker's recovery
feed.summary: Moderna CEO Stéphane Bancel, who previously donated $176 million from his original stock options, is taking a different approach with his new options set to expire in February 2026. This move signals his confidence in the drugmaker's potential recovery.

feed.title: TD Cowen reiterates Buy rating on Globe Life stock, sees 40% upside
feed.summary: TD Cowen has reiterated its Buy rating and $199.00 price target on Globe Life (NYSE:GL), implying approximately 40% upside potential. The firm maintained its positive outlook after meetings with management, who highlighted increasing agent counts, positive sales trends for 2026, and confidence in double-digit EPS growth. Globe Life also appears on track to secure Bermuda reinsurance approval by year-end 2025.

feed.title: The Great Split: How Western Digital Reclaimed the Storage Throne in the AI Era
feed.summary: Western Digital (NASDAQ: WDC) has dramatically transformed in 2025 by spinning off its Flash memory business into SanDisk Corporation (NASDAQ: SNDK), re-emerging as a focused Hard Disk Drive (HDD) powerhouse. The company is capitalizing on the "AI Data Cycle," providing high-capacity storage vital for generative AI training, which has led to record stock performance and profitability. WDC's strategic shift to focus on mass storage for cloud providers and innovations in areal density, such as HAMR technology, position it strongly in the AI era, despite ongoing geopolitical and technological transition risks.

feed.title: Trump administration ups payer price transparency requirements
feed.summary: The Trump administration has proposed significant updates to the Transparency in Coverage (TiC) rule, aiming to improve healthcare price transparency. These updates, developed by CMS, the Department of Labor, and the Department of the Treasury, seek to address issues like data inaccessibility and ambiguity in current compliance. The changes include reformatting data files, requiring change logs, and strengthening price comparison tools, though no new requirements for prescription drug price transparency were included.

feed.title: Adeia (NASDAQ:ADEA) Trading 3.5% Higher Following Analyst Upgrade
feed.summary: Adeia (NASDAQ:ADEA) saw its stock rise 3.5% after Rosenblatt Securities increased its price target from $17 to $20, reiterating a "Buy" rating. This upgrade follows Adeia's new long-term media IP license agreement with The Walt Disney Company and a significant raise in its 2025 financial guidance. The company's updated outlook projects revenue between $425M–$435M and adjusted EBITDA of $257.1M–$265.1M, largely driven by the Disney deal.

feed.title: TD Cowen Upgrades AMETEK to 'Buy' as Industrial Tech Giant Hits Record Highs
feed.summary: TD Cowen has upgraded its rating for industrial technology giant AMETEK to 'Buy'. This upgrade comes as AMETEK's stock has reached record high levels, indicating strong performance and positive outlook from the analyst firm.

feed.title: Phillips 66, Kinder Morgan Close Initial Open Season, Launch Next Phase for Los Angeles Pipeline Capacity
feed.summary: Phillips 66 and Kinder Morgan have concluded the initial open season for their Western Gateway Pipeline, attracting strong shipper commitments for refined products transportation into the Southwest and California. Following this success, a second open season will launch in January 2026, offering expanded delivery options, including new destination points west of Colton, California. This project combines new construction and repurposed infrastructure, linking Midwest refineries to key western U.S. markets.

feed.title: MGM China secures right to use MGM name through 2032 concession term
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International has established a new Long Term Branding Agreement with its Chinese subsidiary, MGM China Holdings Limited, enabling MGM China to use the MGM brand until 2032, coinciding with its current gaming concession. This agreement includes an automatic extension provision and increases the monthly license fee for MGM China from 1.75% to 3.5% of its adjusted consolidated net monthly revenues. The deal offers long-term stability and reflects MGM China's improved performance since the pandemic, with its market share nearly doubling.

feed.title: Delta Won’t Face Class Action Over Short-Term Military Leave
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines Inc. will not face a class-action lawsuit regarding its policy on short-term military leave after a judge denied a motion for class certification but allowed the plaintiffs to refile. The two current named plaintiffs, Delta pilots, lack standing for injunctive relief for other pilots, according to Judge Sarah E. Geraghty. The lawsuit challenges Delta's policy that restricts how pilots can utilize job-protected leave for military service.

feed.title: Rosenblatt Securities Adjusts Adeia Price Target to $20 From $17, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Rosenblatt Securities has increased its price target for Adeia Inc. to $20 from $17, while reiterating a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment follows Adeia's recent financial guidance updates and a new licensing agreement with Walt Disney. The company specializes in intellectual property licensing for various industries, including entertainment and semiconductors.

feed.title: Allarity Therapeutics Completes Additional Private Equity Financing
feed.summary: Allarity Therapeutics recently secured an additional $250,000 in a private placement, following an initial $2.5 million raised in September 2025, to fund general corporate purposes and working capital. Despite this financing, Spark, TipRanks' AI Analyst, rates ALLR as "Underperform" due to significant financial challenges and a bearish technical trend. The company, focused on cancer therapies, has a current market capitalization of $16.28 million.

feed.title: article title here
feed.summary: brief 2-3 sentence summary of the article

feed.title: SLB Bags 5-Year Contract From Aramco To Unlock Saudi Arabia's Unconventional Gas Fields
feed.summary: SLB N.V. has secured a five-year contract from Saudi Aramco to provide advanced stimulation services for its unconventional gas fields. The agreement includes well intervention, frac automation, and digital solutions, aiming to unlock Saudi Arabia's unconventional gas resources. SLB's executive vice president, Steve Gassen, highlighted the company's strong position to deliver tailored solutions for the region's energy development.

feed.title: RTX unit Raytheon lands $1.7 billion deal to supply Patriot systems to Spain By Reuters
feed.summary: Raytheon Technologies, a unit of RTX Corp, secured a $1.7 billion contract to provide Spain with four Patriot air and missile defense systems. The Patriot system, which detects, tracks, and destroys incoming aircraft and missiles, is a crucial component of the U.S. Army's air defense. This deal follows other recent orders for Patriot systems from Germany, the Netherlands, and Romania, and comes amidst U.S. efforts to sustain Ukraine's Patriot defenses.

feed.title: Zacks.com featured highlights include NVIDIA, Micron Technology and Seagate Technology
feed.summary: Zacks.com highlights NVIDIA, Micron Technology, and Seagate Technology as top profitable S&P 500 stocks for investors. The article emphasizes the net income ratio as a key metric for identifying companies with strong bottom-line performance. These three companies are recommended for their high net profit margins as 2026 approaches.

feed.title: Arthur J. Gallagher (NYSE:AJG) Reports Sales Below Analyst Estimates In Q3 CY2025 Earnings
feed.summary: Arthur J. Gallagher (NYSE:AJG) reported Q3 CY2025 earnings with revenue of $3.37 billion, missing analyst estimates of $3.46 billion, although sales increased 21.2% year-on-year. The company's non-GAAP profit of $2.32 per share also fell short of analysts' consensus estimates by 8.5%. Despite these shortfalls, the company demonstrated strong long-term revenue and EPS growth, with analysts projecting significant revenue and EPS growth for the next 12 months.

feed.title: Arch Capital Group Ltd stock hits 52-week high at $97.46
feed.summary: Arch Capital Group Ltd (ACGL) reached a new 52-week high of $97.46, reflecting strong investor confidence, robust financial health, and an 18% return on equity. Despite a revenue shortfall in Q3 2025 earnings, the company exceeded EPS expectations, showing resilience and potential for sustained growth. Analysts have mixed ratings, with CFRA maintaining a Strong Buy while Mizuho initiated with Neutral.

feed.title: MetLife (NYSE:MET) Price Target Raised to $94.00 at Wells Fargo & Company
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company has increased MetLife's (NYSE:MET) price target from $92.00 to $94.00, maintaining an "overweight" rating and suggesting a 15.69% potential upside. Several other analysts also issued reports, with a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating and an average target price of $95.73. MetLife reported strong Q3 earnings, surpassing analyst estimates, and institutional investors hold a significant portion of its stock.

feed.title: Patient Dies After Taking Pfizer’s Drug for Blood Disorder
feed.summary: A patient participating in an open-label extension study for Pfizer Inc.'s hemophilia drug, Hympavzi, died on December 14, 2025, after experiencing a stroke and brain bleeding. This incident marks a setback for Pfizer in the treatment of blood disorders, as reported by the European Haemophilia Consortium. Hympavzi is approved to treat hemophilia, a condition that impairs blood clotting.

feed.title: Levi & Korsinsky Announces an Investigation on Behalf of Vistagen Therapeutics, Inc. (VTGN) Shareholders Who May Have Been Affected by Fraud
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky has initiated an investigation into Vistagen Therapeutics, Inc. (VTGN) regarding potential violations of federal securities laws. This investigation follows a significant 81% drop in VTGN's stock price after the company announced that its PALISADE-3 study for social anxiety disorder failed to meet its primary efficacy endpoint. The firm is seeking to provide additional information to affected shareholders.

feed.title: CarMax, Inc. (KMX) Shareholders Get Answers in Latest SueWallSt Podcast
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has released a podcast detailing a class action securities lawsuit filed on behalf of CarMax, Inc. (NYSE:KMX) investors. The lawsuit alleges that CarMax's growth prospects were recklessly overstated between June 20, 2025, and November 5, 2025, due to a temporary benefit from customers buying cars in anticipation of tariffs. Shareholders who experienced losses are encouraged to contact Levi & Korsinsky for more information.

feed.title: Form 424B2 JPMORGAN CHASE & CO
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC has filed a Form 424B2 for Callable Contingent Interest Notes linked to the Nasdaq-100 Technology Sector Index, Russell 2000 Index, and S&P 500 Index, due December 24, 2030. These notes offer contingent interest payments if each index is above 70% of its initial value, but investors risk principal loss if any index falls below its trigger value. The notes are fully and unconditionally guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co.

feed.title: BMO downgrades Brown & Brown as talent competition clouds growth outlook
feed.summary: BMO Capital Markets downgraded insurance broker Brown & Brown to Market Perform, citing intensifying competition for insurance talent, particularly from private equity-backed rivals. This competition is expected to weigh on the broker’s organic growth over the next several years, leading BMO to cut its organic growth forecasts for 2026 and 2027. Despite the downgrade, BMO acknowledged that increased compensation costs from talent wars could partially offset revenue hits and that the shares are trading below historical levels.

feed.title: Construction begins on Wells Fargo bank in Valley Ranch Town Center
feed.summary: Construction has commenced on a new Wells Fargo location within Valley Ranch Town Center in New Caney, Texas. The bank, founded in 1852, offers a wide range of personal, business, investment, and corporate banking services. This new branch is anticipated to open in May 2026.

feed.title: Northern Trust stock hits all-time high at $140.77 By Investing.com
feed.summary: Northern Trust Corporation's stock has reached an all-time high of $140.77, reflecting a significant 35.61% increase over the past year due to strong performance and investor confidence. The company has also issued $1.25 billion in new debt securities, made key leadership appointments in its Asset Servicing and Wealth Management divisions, and reduced its prime rate. These strategic moves and expansions underscore Northern Trust's resilience in the financial services market.

feed.title: Regeneron stock reaches 52-week high at $791.00
feed.summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals Inc. (REGN) stock has reached a new 52-week high of $791.00, reflecting strong investor confidence and a "GREAT" financial health score from InvestingPro. The company's stock has seen a 9.59% increase over the past year and a 52.66% surge in the last six months, supported by management's aggressive share buyback program. Recent analyst updates show mixed sentiments with some raising price targets due to growth in products like Dupixent and strategic collaborations, while others remain cautious regarding risk/reward scenarios.

feed.title: GE stock reaches 52-week high at 316.88 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: GE stock has reached a 52-week high of $316.88, marking an 84.24% increase over the past year, driven by strong performance in GE Aerospace and strategic partnerships. This milestone reflects significant investor confidence and the company's robust market position, with a market capitalization of $333.67 billion. Recent developments include a quarterly dividend announcement, major engine supply deals with Saudia Group and Emirates, and a positive rating initiation from Susquehanna.

feed.title: Union Pacific, Norfolk Southern move forward with merger
feed.summary: Union Pacific Corp. and Norfolk Southern Corp. have filed an application with the US Surface Transportation Board seeking approval to merge, aiming to create the country's first transcontinental railroad. The merger, targeting an early 2027 closure, seeks to improve freight service by eliminating interchange delays and expanding rail solutions across 43 states. While it could offer benefits like single-line service for grain shippers, concerns about reduced competition also exist.

feed.title: NYSE Content Advisory: Pre-Market Update + S&P 500 Comes Off Third-Straight Winning Session
feed.summary: The New York Stock Exchange provides a daily pre-market update, highlighting the S&P 500's third consecutive winning session, led by AI and big tech stocks. The "Santa Claus Rally" is set to begin, with the S&P 500 up over 16% year-to-date, as investors also digest a Q3 Real GDP report showing the U.S. economy grew by 4.3% year-over-year.

feed.title: Beyond Botox: AbbVie’s push for broader gains in neurotoxin R&D
feed.summary: AbbVie is expanding its neurotoxin research and development beyond Botox, aiming to introduce new therapeutic indications and enhance its aesthetics product line. The company is advancing two next-generation neurotoxins, AGN-151607 and TrenibotE, to address high unmet medical needs and reclaim market share in the competitive aesthetics space. This strategic move builds on Botox's established history in both therapeutic and cosmetic applications to secure future growth.

feed.title: RTX unit Raytheon lands $1.7 billion deal to supply Patriot systems to Spain
feed.summary: Raytheon, a unit of RTX, has secured a significant $1.7 billion deal to supply Patriot air defense systems to Spain. This news comes from Reuters, indicating a major international defense contract for the company.

feed.title: Rtx Corp stock hits all-time high at 186.83 USD
feed.summary: RTX Corporation's stock reached an all-time high of $186.83, surpassing its previous 52-week high, following a 62.17% surge over the past year. This achievement is backed by strong investor confidence, strategic initiatives, and recent significant defense contracts for its Raytheon and Collins Aerospace businesses. The company maintains a substantial market capitalization and has a long history of dividend payments, with analysts watching for sustained momentum.
